name: aigenius-desktop-server
description: Minimal local HTTP server for the AIGenius desktop app (Hono, not full NestJS)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join('python');const dst=p.join('dist','python');fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true,filter:(s)=>!String(s).includes('__pycache__')});fs.mkdirSync(p.join('dist','search'),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(p.join('src','search','schema.sql'),p.join('dist','search','schema.sql'));" && node scripts/verify-dist-layout.cjs
scripts.test:voice-sidecar: cd python && python3 -m unittest discover -s voice_sidecar_lib/tests -p 'test_*.py' -v
